creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 185297
shar file

alttab is X11 window switcher designed for minimalistic window managers (ratpoison, xmonad and others) or standalone X11 session. It is lightweight and depends only on basic X11 libs, conforming to the usage of lightweight WM.

WWW: https://github.com/sagb/alttab

QA:
  portlint -ACN: OK
  poudriere testport: OK (11a, 10i)
